projects.name: Medical Appointment Web Application
projects.description: Developed a responsive web platform that allows patients to book appointments with doctors online. The system includes patient login, appointment scheduling, and viewing medical history.

projects.name: Movie Vault OTT Application
projects.description: Built a mobile application for browsing and streaming movies. Implemented user authentication and movie database integration using Firebase.

projects.name: Banking Cash Flow Minimizer
projects.description: Developed a graph-based algorithm to minimize the number of transactions required to settle debts between multiple banks. Used greedy optimization techniques to reduce overall transaction costs.

projects.name: Full Stack Job Portal
projects.description: Created a job portal platform that connects job seekers with recruiters. Features include job search, resume upload, application tracking, and recruiter dashboards.

goals: To work as a software developer at a product-based company and build scalable applications that solve real-world problems.

raw_sections.projects:
PROJECTS

1. Medical Appointment Web Application
Developed a responsive web platform that allows patients to book appointments with doctors online.
The system includes patient login, appointment scheduling, and viewing medical history.
Technologies used: HTML, CSS, JavaScript.

2. Movie Vault OTT Application
Built a mobile application for browsing and streaming movies.
Implemented user authentication and movie database integration using Firebase.
Technologies used: Flutter, Dart, Firebase.

3. Banking Cash Flow Minimizer
Developed a graph-based algorithm to minimize the number of transactions required to settle debts between multiple banks.
Used greedy optimization techniques to reduce overall transaction costs.
Technologies used: Python, Graph Algorithms, Data Structures.

4. Full Stack Job Portal
Created a job portal platform that connects job seekers with recruiters.
Features include job search, resume upload, application tracking, and recruiter dashboards.
Technologies used: React, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB.
